highlights.title: AI safety and reliability data-quality work recognized as international standard
highlights.summary: News coverage reports ETRI's AI data-quality standardization outcome and references Ha Suwook's role in the effort.
highlights.impact: Strengthens positioning as a standards-driven AI quality expert.

highlights.title: International standard publication for AI data-analysis technology
highlights.summary: Nate News reports the international standardization result around AI data-analysis technology and introduces participating experts.
highlights.impact: Provides media-verifiable evidence of international standard activity.

highlights.title: Korean delegation highlighted for AI data standardization leadership
highlights.summary: Financial News article covers international standardization initiatives including AI data and related standardization leadership.
highlights.impact: Shows long-term continuity in global standards participation.

highlights.title: ETRI standard strategy report featuring AI and ICT standard system planning
highlights.summary: ETRI Knowledge Sharing Platform report documents standardization strategy and planning context related to the AI/ICT domain.
highlights.impact: Adds institutional strategy-level credibility to the profile.

highlights.title: Technical publication on domestic and global big-data standardization
highlights.summary: ETRI Trends publication discusses global big-data standardization landscape and outlook, including key contributors.

highlights.title: Open-source project activity on GitHub
highlights.summary: Public GitHub profile provides discoverable project history, repository updates, and technology evidence.
highlights.impact: Improves technical visibility and proof of implementation capability.
